display_text: Sand King Aghanim's Scepter: Epicenter now creates 3 Stinger attack areas every 0.5s at random locations, dealing 50% of Stinger damage. This upgrade counters enemy positioning and clustering by creating unpredictable damage zones, forcing enemies to scatter or take significant AoE damage during team fights.
search_text: Sand King Aghanim Scepter Epicenter Stinger anti-clustering AoE control random damage zones

display_text: Sand King Aghanim's Shard: Increases Epicenter damage per pulse and causes a small single Epicenter Pulse around Sand King every 3s. This upgrade enhances Sand King's sustained damage output and zone control, making him a persistent threat even outside of full Epicenter casts, countering prolonged engagements and slow-push strategies.
search_text: Sand King Aghanim Shard Epicenter sustained damage zone control anti-slow push
